title: holosteum umbellatum subsp. viscosissimum
intro: Holosteum umbellatum subsp. viscosissimum, also known as sticky cranesbill, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Europe, with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and wounds, due to its health benefits such as soothing irritated mucous membranes and promoting tissue repair. Holosteum umbellatum subsp. viscosissimum can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to affected areas.
